title: nemophila heterophylla
intro: Nemophila heterophylla, also known as the lesser or woodland nemophila, is a type of flowering plant native to the western United States. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves and flowers, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Nemophila heterophylla can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
